- Description: GACC Registration Guides — Brazil to China (Sophia Truesight)

  Details:
  Created and reviewed GACC registration guides for three Brazilian cacao cooperatives exporting to Dongguan, China.
  
  **What changed:**
  - Created GACC registration guides for Black King (Ilhéus, BA), Coopercabruca (Itabuna, BA), and CEPOTX (Altamira, PA)
  - Updated freight forwarder contacts from Gmail (Omega Serviços Logísticos)
  - Removed Coopercabruca fallback section from Black King guide
  - Removed Omega from CEPOTX guide (different region — Pará vs Bahia)
  - Generated companion PDFs for all three guides
  
  **Pull requests:**
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/537
